What's included
Everything you need
for the perfect night

Minibus Tour — 2,400 kr

Max 15 guests · 5–9 hours
  • Full Arctic thermal suit — keeps you warm to –20°C
  • Hotdog or vegan option + warm drinks by bonfire
  • Free professional aurora photos sent next morning
  • Tripods for your own camera and photography tips
  • Unlimited aurora hunt — no fixed end time
  • Meet at Scandic Ishavshotel · Drop-off city centre
  • Live skycams along the entire coast, far south and deep into Finland

Bus Tour — 1,200 kr

Max 50 guests · 5–9 hours
  • Full Arctic thermal suit — keeps you warm to –20°C
  • Warm drinks and traditional Norwegian snacks
  • Free professional aurora photos sent next morning
  • Expert local guide with real-time aurora tracking
  • 5–9 hour aurora hunt across the region
  • Meet at Scandic Ishavshotel · Drop-off city centre
  • Live skycams along the entire coast, far south and deep into Finland
Why choose us

Tromsø's most
trusted aurora guides

Snow Travels is rated #1 on GetYourGuide in Tromsø with over 1,780 verified five-star reviews. Our 97.54% aurora success rate — verified across three full seasons — is among the highest of any tour operator in the region. We achieve this through live skycam monitoring across the entire coastline, far south and deep into Finland, giving us real-time weather data that most operators simply do not have. Combined with decades of local knowledge, we know exactly where to go — and we drive there without hesitation.
